---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for DarkWeb CMS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: xDarkheim
---

## Feature Summary

A brief, one-line summary of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the motivation behind it.

> Example: "As an admin, I cannot bulk-ban players, which makes moderation very slow."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see, as clearly as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, what are they and why do you prefer your suggestion?

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, links, references, or additional context that would help understand the request.
